utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. (3) transportation: includes detailed flight info (airline, airports, class, baggage, cancellation, cost) — fully specified. (4) accommodation: includes hotel name, type, room type, nights, location, amenities, cost — fully specified. (5) activities: includes list of activities, duration, guided/difficulty info, cost — fully specified. (6) additional_services: includes dining details but missing explicit cost — not fully specified. (7) total_budget: includes total cost, currency, breakdown, and within_budget flag — fully specified. Thus, 6 total items, 5 fully specified.
